heading: Toddler Activities for Piper

search_strategy: Dedup key = venue + event_type. ROTATE venues within 30 miles of Edmonds (47.810652, -122.377355). Any item in covered[] with cite_count ≥ 3 in past 14 days gets cooldown_days=7 (computed effective cooldown = last_referenced + cooldown_days). Prefer venues from venue_diversification_targets[] that are not in covered[] or whose effective cooldown has elapsed. If nothing new in a day, walk the full 30mi radius rather than re-cite Edmonds Library.

cooldown_rules._comment: Applied at Step 6.5 when updating covered[]. Rule: any item whose cite_count reaches the threshold gets cooldown_days bumped to the specified value.

ongoing_narrative: Toddler-activities coverage through mid-April 2026 has improved venue rotation. The April 15 briefing introduced two fresh venues not previously cited: Wonderland Play Group at Mountlake Terrace Library and Family Storytime with Miss Alayna at Brier Library (Sno-Isle branch) — both first appearances. Edmonds Library Toddler Storytime (cite_count: 4) remains on cooldown until 2026-04-22. Going forward: enforce cooldown_days + cite_count via computed effective cooldown. Prefer venues from venue_diversification_targets, rotating across storytime / play_group / art_studio / music_class / nature / splash / indoor_play / museum / farm. If nothing new in a day, walk the full 30mi radius. If still nothing, acknowledge scarcity in Jeeves's voice rather than re-cite Edmonds Library.
